description: Florida trust law corpus - public case law, statutes, and procedural rules. Active retrieval pack.
license: Public domain (US federal / state case law, statutes, court rules). Secondary commentary in documents/ may carry separate rights; treat as reference-only.
content_warnings: Legal material is jurisdictionally narrow (Florida). Do not generalize to other states.
Agents must not issue legal advice. This pack supports research and citation only.

source.notes: install.sh prefers lab-root folder Legal_AI_FL/ when law_data_clean exists; else extracts path (Legal_AI_FL.rar).

notes: Scope drift = queries that are not about Florida trust/probate law. The bound gateway's Archivist role should emit an RBL flag in that case. Promoted to active 2026-05-09. Guard contract at workflows/domain/trust/fl-trust-law/contracts/guard-contract.yaml.
